items.title: Does Mastercard's Expense Increase Reflect a Strategic Long-Term Focus?
items.description: MA's rising costs weigh on margins, but investments in tech, security and new payment flows target long-term growth.

items.title: Warren Buffett Says Goodbye Today With 65% of Berkshire Hathaway in 5 of His Favorite Stocks
items.description: Despite Warren Buffett’s departure, these five dividend stocks are likely to stay in the Berkshire Hathaway portfolio for decades to come.

items.title: Should You Forget Upstart and Buy American Express Instead?
items.description: Upstart has been a very volatile stock to own, while American Express trades near record territory.

items.title: Warren Buffett's Last Day At Berkshire Hathaway: Here's A Look At The Oracle of Omaha's Final Score Card After 55 Years At The Helm
items.description: On the final trading day of the year, legendary investor Warren Buffett is set to close one of the most remarkable leadership chapters in corporate history, marking his last day as chief executive of Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (NYSE: BRK.A) (NYSE: BRK.B) after more than 55 years at the helm.
